upgrades.changelog:
- Fixed an issue where the P20 could not restore its default settings.
- Changed the default value of P50 (Button Delay) to 3.
- Optimized the network re-connection logic.
- Further optimized the interaction logic between the mmWave module and the Z-Wave chip.
- Optimized the processing logic of the metering module.

- Optimized the interaction logic between the switch and the mmWave module.
- Fixed the incorrect use of duration in the SwitchMultilevel Set command.
- When the switch is restarted, P240 will be reported to indicate that the switch has been restarted.
